about_item: Premium Durable Dog Pad: Polyester cotton filling to provide comfort and warmth both indoors and out,the front side is skin-friendly, extra soft velvet, guaranteeing a excellent rest, and the layered polyester cotton filling wonderfully cushions the post-zoomie pet after a long day in the wild and indoor. No rustling：super quiet, sleep at ease

Waterproof and Anti-Slip Travel Dog Bed: We’ve tweaked our previous dog camping mat designs for that waterproof functionality you need. PVC fabric bottom side that’s waterproof, doesn’t slide, and is grease/abrasion resistant for use in the outdoors

Large Dog Bed Crate Pad Mat: Measures at 43” by 27” to fit most pet sizes including medium to large dogs, giving them their own space to rest.Please Allow 0.4 to 0.8 Inch Differs Due to Manual Measurement. Designed to fit most dog , ideal for large breeds or several dogs to share.Folded Dimensions: 13”(L)*7”(D)

Portable Camping Dog Bed:Spreads out easily via UTX-Duraflex quick-release buckles and rolls up small for efficient storage; comes with a grab handle for hassle-free transportation.Suitable for travels, hiking, camping and other outdoor activities with your pet, as well as indoor use as a pet bed

Onetigris High Quality Thickened Dog Sleeping Mat: Tight seams,won't leak padding,The front side is skin-friendly, extra soft velvet that create a cozy den for your pet. And this dog mat is easy ro clean,clean by hand with water, mild detergent and a wet cloth, and hang to dry. Avoid direct sunlight.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed easy to stow and carry, with one mentioning it rolls up nicely for travel. The bed is soft on the top side and has a grippy material underneath, making it comfortable and durable. While some customers praise its thickness, others find it not thick enough.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect traveling bed for your furry friend
authors_reviews.text: This is the ideal dog bed for travel! It’s lightweight, folds up easily, and fits perfectly in the car. The material feels durable yet soft, and the color is stylish and neutral—great for any setting. My dog took to it right away and seems super comfortable. It’s waterproof and very functional for any setting. It’s a little thin but perfect for travel. Best of all, it’s easy to wash, which is a huge plus after outdoor adventures. Highly recommend for any pet parent on the go!
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Fantastic travel bed!
authors_reviews.text: We have a 55 lbs GSD/Husky mix and needed a bed that was easily to bring with us when we travel for sports and this bed is PERFECT.She laid down on it immediately and seems very comfy on it.It’s nice and soft on the top side and underneath is a grippy material so it doesn’t slide around. It has just enough “fluff” to it. It’s not crazy flat like a towel but it’s not super thick. It’s easy to roll back up and secure with the straps.We got a travel backpack for her food and stuff and this fits perfectly inside it.If you’re on the fence, just make the jump and get it. Totally worth the buy!
authors_reviews.author: Ashley

authors_reviews.title: Excellent
authors_reviews.text: I’m surprised this blanket doesn’t have more love, it’s in my top 10 of dog car gear. I love this mat and so does my large GSD…it’s kind of luxurious for what it is with is soft and comfy velour top and the padded thickness for nice insulation! We got our first one in green, almost two years ago and it’s been a go-to because we both enjoy using it: the bottom is nicely weather resistant, the top velour brushes off fairly easily, it washes well and it’s durable. The thickness is nice to insulate from cold or damp ground. But most of all, I love how easy it is to pack up with the compression/carry straps. Other blankets you have to fold just right, or cram it back into a stuff sack, but this one you can fold or roll however you want, clip the buckles and then tighten the straps…it’s just easier not only to pack up, but to clip onto another pack. It just makes life comfortable and easy…what more could you ask for? I have one for each vehicle and we end up using them multiple times weekly, even in the winter. Highly recommend.
authors_reviews.author: mad hatter

authors_reviews.title: Pup loved it
authors_reviews.text: As soon as I unrolled this my pup laid right down on it. Easy to roll up. Wish the straps were attached to the blanket, I could see losing them. Slight cushioning which is nice with a mat that rolls up.
authors_reviews.author: Kristy

authors_reviews.title: Rugged and well made.
authors_reviews.text: Purchased this mat for summer camping adventures with my dog. She loves to curl up on it in the tent, and the waterproof antislip bottom cleans off easily when we cowboy camp and sleep out on the ground. She also likes to curl up on it while we travel. Rolls up very compact and the harness with handle makes it easy to stow and carry.
authors_reviews.author: James L. Justus

authors_reviews.title: Best high quality mat for a great price
authors_reviews.text: I was looking for a travel mat for my bony greyhound (he needs something that's not paper thin) and couldn't find anything. For a travel mat this is a very good thickness and it has an amazing soft velvet top. It feels sturdy and the bottom is grippy. It has also been doubling as a pad for his crate when needed. DEFINITELY recommend
authors_reviews.author: Marc

authors_reviews.title: Dog loves it
authors_reviews.text: It’s not super thick but my dog seems to still like it. I like that it rolls up quickly.
authors_reviews.author: Brent

authors_reviews.title: My dog loves this!
authors_reviews.text: We take it camping, to restaurants, on the back porch and more. He knows it's his "spot", it's comfy and it "anchors" him. It's easy to carry around and I am so glad we bought it!
authors_reviews.author: Heidi Casey

other_countries_reviews.title: Perfekter Urlaubsbegleiter
other_countries_reviews.text: Diese Decke war die perfekte Wahl für unseren Wanderurlaub.Robust, Schmutzabweisend, schnell eingerollt, leichtes Gewicht und trotzdem stabil, um auch auf unebenem Gelände einen schönen Liegeplatz zu ermöglichen.

other_countries_reviews.title: Super !
other_countries_reviews.text: Au top pour les voyages et déplacements !

other_countries_reviews.title: Tolle Decke
other_countries_reviews.text: Tolle Decke, der Hund fühlt sich wohl. Der Feuchtigkeit und Schmutz abweisende Untergrund ist sehr praktisch und die Decke lässt sich super transportieren.
